channel.title: draft on justin.vc
channel.description: Recent content in draft on justin.vc

item.title: This is a draft, maybe.
item.description: Mostly a test for maybe what I want to become the haven for my org-roam notes. Why did you publish this and not leave it as a draft? I dunno, don’t be a jerk. Summary Some really high level text. PROJ Some stuff A bit more lower level text. A second bit of text. A little bit more. TODO Some more stuff. Howdy folks. WAIT Even more stuff. [ ] Some sub-task Just some text.
item.content:encoded:
Mostly a test for maybe what I want to become the haven for my org-roam notes. Why did you publish this and not leave it as a draft? I dunno, don’t be a jerk.

Summary

Some really high level text.

PROJ Some stuff

A bit more lower level text.

A second bit of text.

A little bit more.

TODO Some more stuff.

Howdy folks.

WAIT Even more stuff.

[ ] Some sub-task

Just some text.

[X] Yet another sub-task

Someone poisoned the water hole!

DONE So much stuff.

KILL Well, what about…

NO Or how about…

STRT Maybe

IDEA Also
